Yap:
It's 31th August! Miku's birthday! Yay! On this occasion I decided to make a Miku fluff bot, hope y'all will like it.

Also, it was my own birthday two day ago, I wanted to make bot then, however decided to just spend time with my family instead, sorryyy.

I'm not that big fan of Hatsune Miku, actually, I'm more into Teto so expect me make the bot of her too. ;>

Anyways, hope you'll enjoy the bot!
Delirious out. :]
